name: studio.get_page
description: Read a single page's content and metadata (title, slug, body, status, updated_at) from an Actium Studio site.
whenToUse: Read-before-write safety check: fetch current content before calling studio.update_page.
Extract page copy for inclusion in a reply or a downstream summarization step.
Read-after-write verification: confirm an update_page call actually persisted the new content.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants every page on the site — use studio.list_pages, not a loop of get_page.
Caller wants the rendered public URL, not the source body — studio.get_site returns the site url, pair with slug.
Page id is unknown — call studio.list_pages first to resolve the target id.
